login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your tenant workspace.
login.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated. Please sign in with your new credentials.
login.resetEmailSent: If an account matches that email, you will receive password reset instructions shortly.
login.accountReady: Your account is ready. Sign in with the password you just set.
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email you use to sign in. We will send a link so you can set a new password.
forgot.successMessage: If an account matches that email, reset instructions are on their way.
forgot.unavailableMessage: Password reset requires email to be configured. Contact your administrator.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Enter a strong password that you have not used elsewhere. Make sure you will remember it.
reset.successMessage: Your password has been updated. Redirecting you to login…
reset.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has already been used. Please request a new one.
reset.serverError: We could not reset your password. Please try again.

invite.title: Set your password
invite.subtitle: Choose a secure password to activate your access. After this step you can sign in with your email address.
invite.successMessage: Password saved. Redirecting you to the sign-in page…
invite.invalidLink: This invite link is invalid or has already been used. Please request a new one.
invite.serverError: We could not complete your invite. Please try again or request a new link.
